oracleCard.name: Mathemagics
oracleCard.text: Target player draws 2ˣ cards. (2⁰ = 1, 2¹ = 2, 2² = 4, 2³ = 8, 2⁴ = 16, 2⁵ = 32, and so on.)

oracleCard.text:
Flying

card.flavor: It lurks in the spaces between moments.
